title: Has anyone integrated Bluehost emails?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I know we can integrate with Outlook and Mailchimp. But our emails are hosted with Bluehost. Do you know of a way I can integrate them with Monday - in the updates section please? 
Thanks 
Kellie

posts.author: RWPACT (Kellie Warner-Keith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I know we can integrate with Outlook and Mailchimp. But our emails are hosted with Bluehost. Do you know of a way I can integrate them with Monday - in the updates section please?

Thanks
Kellie

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kellie!

Sounds like Bluehost hosts your inbox. If you’re using an email server that isn’t Outlook or Gmail or Mailchimp, you do still have some options for integration.

For example, you might use the following Zapier modules to connect your mail server to Zapier. SMTP and IMAP are standard mail protocols – if you’ve got an email server, chances are you can connect these services to your account.

SMTP by Zapier - for sending mail out
IMAP by Zapier - for reading incoming mail

posts.author: RWPACT (Kellie Warner-Keith)
posts.cookedHtml: Ahhh Brilliant, I didn’t realise I could do that with Zapier. Thank you!

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
